company_name: Pristine Pool Service And Repair, Inc.
tagline: Stop Settling for Sub-Par Pool Maintenance

hero.headline:
Fresno's Most Trusted Pool Care
Family Since 1996
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than a guy with a net. With 28+ years of CPO-certified expertise, the Lopes family delivers the kind of meticulous, full-service pool care that keeps your water pristine and your weekends free.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From the<br class="hidden md:block"> Family That Does It Right
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, Pristine Pool Service handles every aspect of pool care so you never have to worry about your water again.

cards.title: Residential Pool Service
cards.description: Weekly full-service maintenance including chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for apartment complexes, HOAs, and commercial facilities. We keep you compliant with health and safety standards — guaranteed.

cards.title: Green Pool Clean-Up
cards.description: Algae-covered nightmare? We restore neglected pools to crystal-clear condition fast. Our specialized treatment gets you swimming again in days, not weeks.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnostics and repair for pumps, filters, heaters, sweeps, and salt systems. CPO-certified techs fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Energy-efficient equipment installations certified through PG&E's CAEI program. Upgrade your pool equipment and save on energy costs.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing by certified professionals. Safe, clear water that's gentle on skin and eyes — because chemistry matters.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Pristine Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. We'll visit your pool, assess its condition, and give you an honest quote — no pressure, no gimmicks. Just straightforward pricing from a family that values your trust.

steps.title: Our CPO-Certified Team Takes Over
steps.description: Our experienced, CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule every week. Full-service cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment inspections — all handled with 28 years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pristine Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, properly balanced, and always ready for a swim. If anything is ever less than pristine, we come back and make it right — that's the Lopes family guarantee.

about.label: Why Fresno Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, CPO-Certified, and Committed to Pristine
about.description: Joe and Kristi Lopes founded Pristine Pool Service in 1996 with a simple belief: every pool should be as close to its original, pristine condition as possible. Over 28 years later, that standard hasn't changed. Every technician on our team is CPO-certified through the National Swimming Pool Foundation, and our company maintains an A+ BBB rating because we treat every pool — and every client — like family.

features.title: All Technicians CPO-Certified
features.description: Every tech on our team holds a Certified Pool/Spa Operator credential through the National Swimming Pool Foundation. No exceptions.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: California Contractor License #972904. Fully bonded and insured for your protection. BBB Accredited with an A+ rating.

features.title: 28+ Years, Same Family
features.description: Joe and Kristi Lopes still run the business personally. When you call Pristine, you're talking to the family that stakes their name on every job.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote after a free inspection. What you'll always get: honest pricing, thorough service, and zero hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pristine Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't pristine after any service visit, call us. We'll come back and re-service it at no charge — no questions asked. We've built our reputation on this promise for 28 years, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within one week. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Call us at (559) 456-4011 and we'll find the earliest available slot.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Every single technician is CPO-certified through the National Swimming Pool Foundation. We also hold CAEI certification from PG&E for energy-efficient equipment installations. Our team averages 10-15+ years of hands-on pool experience.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve apartment complexes, HOAs, and commercial facilities across Fresno, Clovis, and Madera Ranchos. Commercial clients receive dedicated technicians and flexible scheduling to meet health and safety compliance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Fresno, Clovis, and Madera Ranchos, California. If you're not sure whether you're in our service area, give us a call — we're happy to check.

faqs.question: What makes Pristine different from other pool services?
faqs.answer: We're family-owned and operated for over 28 years. Every technician is CPO-certified, we're licensed (Contractor #972904), bonded, insured, and BBB Accredited with an A+ rating. We don't cut corners — the name Pristine is our promise.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: This company does a very good job on keeping my pool sparkling. My tech is very thorough with cleaning and equipment maintenance.

testimonials.name: Happy Client
testimonials.text: Amazing service and great customer care. They are super busy, but they do provide a great service.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Customer
testimonials.text: Best pool service I have ever had. Joe, Kristi and their staff are very friendly and polite. Their work is thorough and professional.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That's
Always Pristine?
contact.subtitle: Get a free on-site inspection and honest quote. No pressure, no gimmicks — just 28 years of family-owned pool care expertise working for you.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service proudly serving Fresno since 1996. Licensed, bonded, insured & BBB A+ rated.
